topic: A pen on my desk writes one line each night, finishing a letter I never began.
title: A Pen On My Desk Writes By Itself | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Each night a pen on my desk writes one new line of a letter I never started.
scenes.image_prompt: A fountain pen lying across a sheet of handwritten paper on a dark desk, dim lamp light, deep shadow, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I work from a small study above the garage.
scenes.image_prompt: A cramped home study at night, bookshelves, single desk lamp, heavy shadow in corners, muted color, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I cap the pen and leave the page blank.
scenes.image_prompt: A capped pen resting on a blank sheet of paper, warm low lamp glow, long shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first morning one sentence sat there in my handwriting.
scenes.image_prompt: A single line of cursive at the top of a blank page, harsh side light, shallow focus, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
A hand hovering above written words without touching the page, dim lamp light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each night added one more line, addressed to me.
scenes.image_prompt: A page slowly filling with lines of cursive, the salutation visible, dim study light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I locked the pen in a drawer and bought a new one.
scenes.image_prompt: A pen sealed inside a desk drawer, key in the lock, low warm light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By dawn the new pen had written the next line.
scenes.image_prompt: A different pen resting on fresh handwriting on a page, dim lamp glow, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The letter described my own days back to me.
scenes.image_prompt: A full page of cursive describing daily routines, pen across it, harsh side light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night it wrote what I would do tomorrow.
scenes.image_prompt: A page with future tense cursive lines, lamp casting long shadow over the desk, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every prediction came true by evening.
scenes.image_prompt: A checked off page beside a watch on a dark desk, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tonight the final line says goodbye, and the pen is gone.
scenes.image_prompt: A blank space at the foot of a written page where a pen should lie, empty desk, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing
